# Niavicta: nianav OS

> Niavicta builds nianav OS, the operating system for regulated startups. It puts procedures, records, evidence, and AI governance in one connected system, so audit-ready evidence is produced as work happens instead of reconstructed before an audit.

nianav OS is built for medical device, health AI, biotech, and fintech companies in the window before scale: the moment after the product works and before serious growth, when the operating foundation has to be right. Niavicta was founded in 2026 by two compliance professionals and is based in Utrecht, the Netherlands. The product is being built in the open with a small number of design partners. Contact: hello@niavicta.com.

Key facts:
- Product names: nianav and nianav OS refer to the same product. The canonical product page is https://niavicta.com/nianav-os.html.
- What it is: one connected operating system for procedures, records, evidence, training, change control, and AI governance.
- Who it is for: regulated startups, especially medical device (EU MDR / IVDR), health AI, biotech, and fintech.
- The idea: the rule lives inside the step, so compliance evidence is a byproduct of doing the work.
- AI governance: AI agents operate under a named owner, a permitted scope, a review path, and a sealed record.
- Stage: the regulated-work engine is built and tested; the first version people can log into is being built now.
- Tagline: Win with intent. Keep winning by design.

## Core pages
- [Sources and standards](https://niavicta.com/sources.html): Official source references for the standards, regulations, and operating-model claims referenced across Niavicta and nianav OS pages.
- [nianav OS](https://niavicta.com/nianav-os.html): What nianav OS is, the problem it solves, how it works, and who it is for.
- [What nianav OS replaces](https://niavicta.com/software.html): The workflow tools nianav OS replaces and the specialist systems it connects to.
- [The agentic era](https://niavicta.com/agentic-era.html): How nianav OS lets startups use AI agents without losing control of evidence.
- [About Niavicta](https://niavicta.com/about.html): Why Niavicta was started, and what the name means (Nia, purpose; Victa, victory).
- [Audit and systems consulting](https://niavicta.com/other-services.html): Niavicta's hands-on audit and systems consulting beyond the software: ISO 13485 and ISO 9001 internal audits by CQI/IRCA and BSI certified lead auditors, plus operations diagnostics, mapping, implementation, and handover for regulated and unregulated companies.
- [ISO 13485 internal auditor for medtech in the Netherlands](https://niavicta.com/iso-13485-internal-auditor-medtech-netherlands.html): Local service page for medtech internal audit queries, covering ISO 13485 and ISO 9001 internal audits, Utrecht/Netherlands/EU service area, certified lead auditor credentials, audit deliverables, objective evidence, and CAPA-ready findings.
- [Become a design partner](https://niavicta.com/build-with-us.html): Where the product is today and how to become a design partner.
- [Follow the journey](https://niavicta.com/follow-the-journey.html): Founder notes, product lessons, and the public record of building nianav OS in the open.

## How it works
- [Step 1: Your answers](https://niavicta.com/how-it-works-answers.html): The short set of answers that configures your operating system.
- [Step 2: Applicable law and standards](https://niavicta.com/how-it-works-standards.html): Your regulatory scope switches on the standards that apply.
- [Step 3: The compliance matrix](https://niavicta.com/how-it-works-matrix.html): Clauses map to procedures, evidence, and owners.
- [Step 4: Procedures](https://niavicta.com/how-it-works-procedures.html): Procedures become running, owned workflows.
- [Step 5: Your operating system](https://niavicta.com/how-it-works-operating-system.html): The whole company runs on one connected record.

## Questions
- [FAQ](https://niavicta.com/faq.html): Common questions about nianav OS, answered plainly.
- [All questions](https://niavicta.com/all-questions.html): The full, searchable question library.

## Follow the journey
- [You don't lose your work to AI. You lose it to going narrow.](https://niavicta.com/you-dont-lose-your-work-to-ai.html): Founder insight from Chani Galgut on staying in charge of your work while building with AI by holding a wide, visible operating overview instead of tunnelling into one vertical.

## Resource pages
- [What is nianav?](https://niavicta.com/nianav.html): nianav is the product name for nianav OS, the operating system for regulated industries built by Niavicta.
- [Operating system for regulated industries](https://niavicta.com/operating-system-for-regulated-industries.html): What an operating system for regulated industries means and how nianav OS connects procedures, records, evidence, and AI governance.
- [Operating system for medtech companies](https://niavicta.com/medtech-operating-system.html): How nianav OS supports medtech operating work across procedures, evidence, design control, quality records, and audit readiness.
- [Operating system for health AI startups](https://niavicta.com/health-ai-operating-system.html): How health AI startups can use nianav OS to connect AI governance, evidence, scope, human review, and operating records.
- [Audit readiness for regulated startups](https://niavicta.com/audit-readiness.html): How nianav OS supports audit readiness by connecting procedures, evidence, owners, reviews, and records as work happens.
- [AI governance operating system](https://niavicta.com/ai-governance-operating-system.html): How nianav OS structures AI governance with scope, named human accountability, review, records, and evidence for regulated teams.
- [Evidence traceability for regulated teams](https://niavicta.com/evidence-traceability.html): How nianav OS connects evidence to procedures, owners, records, requirements, reviews, and operating decisions.
- [nianav OS vs spreadsheets](https://niavicta.com/nianav-os-vs-spreadsheets.html): A practical comparison of nianav OS and spreadsheets for regulated operating work, evidence, ownership, and audit readiness.
- [nianav OS vs Notion](https://niavicta.com/nianav-os-vs-notion.html): A practical comparison of nianav OS and Notion-style workspaces for regulated workflows, evidence, and audit readiness.
- [ISO 13485 startup evidence](https://niavicta.com/iso-13485-startup-evidence.html): A practical guide to ISO 13485 evidence for startups and how nianav OS keeps procedures, records, owners, and proof connected.
- [EU AI Act readiness for health AI startups](https://niavicta.com/eu-ai-act-health-ai-startups.html): How health AI startups can think about EU AI Act readiness, AI governance, human accountability, evidence, and operating records.
- [Project Zero readiness checklist](https://niavicta.com/project-zero-readiness.html): A practical Project Zero readiness checklist for regulated startups preparing to set up nianav OS and their operating foundation.
